creator: tony@lava.net
text:
While doing a 'make buildworld' for RELENG_6_4 from a freshly installed 
source tree:

/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c: In function `dumpino':
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:479: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:493: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c: In function `appendextdata':
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:729: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:737: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:740: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c: In function `writeextdata':
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:774: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:781: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:785: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:790: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:793: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
/usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c:817: error: structure has no member named 
`c_extsize'
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src/sbin/dump.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/obj/usr/src/rescue/rescue.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src/rescue/rescue.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src/rescue.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src.

---------------------------

Contents of /etc/make.conf:

USE_NONDEFAULT_X11BASE=set
# added by use.perl 2009-05-26 18:06:37
PERL_VERSION=5.8.9
NO_PROFILE=true

How-To-Repeat: 	
	cd /usr/src
	rm -rf /usr/obj
	make -j 4 buildworld
	(build error occurs)
	
	make -DNO_CLEAN all
	(build error repeats)
